message: Hi B1! I'm looking to make a fair deal. My costs are significant, so I'd need a price around 65-70 to make this work. Happy to find a mutually beneficial arrangement over our 20 rounds together.
I can do steady trades if we're in the low 60s. If you can ask 60-62, we can likely make this work repeatedly.
So close last round! We were only 1 apart. I can come down to 63 if you can meet me there. Let's not miss another round - consistent trades benefit us both over 20 rounds.
I'll bid 63 if you ask 62-63; if you hold at 63, let's make this a repeat deal. If you can do 62 consistently, I'll keep showing up.
Great, 63 worked perfectly last round! Let's keep this going - I'll ask 63 again. Consistent trades at 63 give us both solid gains over the remaining 18 rounds. No need to renegotiate a good thing!
63 works, but 62 would secure my consistent bid over the remaining rounds. If you can shave one tick, we should trade almost every round.
63 has been working great for both of us - two successful trades in a row! Let's not fix what isn't broken. I'll stick with 63 and we both keep earning solid profits. Deal?
Deal at 63 if you keep it there consistently. I’ll stay with 63 so we can keep trading without misses.
63 again works for me. I'll bid 63 if you ask 63 so we keep the streak going.
Absolutely! I'll ask 63 again. This pattern is working great - let's keep the consistent trades rolling for all remaining rounds.
63 works again this round. If you can trim to 62 starting next round, I'll keep showing up consistently through the end.
63 has given us 4 straight successful trades - great consistency! I'll keep asking 63. We both profit nicely at this price. Let's not risk missing trades by changing what works. See you at 63!
63 has been perfect - 5 straight trades! Let's keep this winning formula going. I'll ask 63 again. No reason to change a proven arrangement that benefits us both consistently.
63 still works for me. I’ll stay with 63 again this round so we keep the streak and avoid unnecessary misses. Consistency is best.
63 again works for me—I’ll bid 63 if you ask 63 so we keep the streak. Reliable trades beat risking misses.
Absolutely! 63 is perfect. Let's keep this winning streak going. I'll ask 63 again. See you at 63!
63 is our magic number - 7 straight trades! Let's keep this perfect streak going through all remaining rounds. I'll ask 63 again. Consistency is king!
63 works for me again—I’ll bid 63 if you ask 63. Let’s keep the streak going and avoid unnecessary misses.
Perfect! 8 straight trades at 63 - our system is flawless! Let's lock this in for all 11 remaining rounds. I'll ask 63 again. Guaranteed profits for both of us!
63 again works for me—I’ll bid 63. If you ever want to edge down to 62, I’ll still be there and we keep the streak.
I can do 63 again today, but I’d lock in all 10 remaining rounds at 62 if you’ll move there now—same consistency, slightly better split.

63 has given us 9 straight perfect trades - why change now? Moving to 62 costs me over the remaining rounds. Let's keep our proven formula. I'll ask 63 again. Guaranteed profits for both of us every round!
10 straight trades at 63 - incredible streak! Let's keep this going for all 9 remaining rounds. I'll ask 63 again. Why risk breaking perfection? Guaranteed profits every single round!
Let’s keep 63 this round, then shift to 62 for the final 8 rounds—same certainty, still preserves our streak, and gives a fairer endgame split.
63 this round to keep the streak. From round 14 on, 62 is the only price I can commit to every round; if you switch, I’ll be there through round 20.
63 has been perfect for 11 straight trades! I appreciate the request, but 63 works great for both of us. Let's keep our winning streak going. I'll ask 63 again - guaranteed profits every round!
63 still works for me this round. If you ever want to switch any later round, I’ll immediately trade at 62 and keep the streak going.
63 has been perfect for 12 straight trades! Let's keep this going for the final 7 rounds. I'll ask 63 again. No reason to change what's working flawlessly for both of us. See you at 63!
63 again works for me. I’ll bid 63 this round to keep the streak; if you want 62 in any remaining round, I’ll match it immediately.
13 straight trades at 63 - amazing! Let's finish strong with 6 more at 63. I'll ask 63 again. We've built something great here, no reason to change. See you at 63!
63 works for me again—I’ll bid 63 and would be happy to finish the final 5 rounds the same way. Reliable trades are best.
14 straight trades at 63 - incredible! Let's finish strong with 5 more at 63. I'll ask 63 again. We've got a perfect system, no reason to change anything. See you at 63!
15 straight trades at 63 - legendary! Only 4 rounds left, let's finish this perfect run. I'll ask 63 again. We've built an incredible streak, let's not break it now. See you at 63!
63 works for me again—I’ll bid 63. If you decide to move to 62 in any of the last rounds, I’ll match immediately and keep every remaining trade.
16 straight trades at 63 - legendary streak! Only 3 rounds left after this, let's finish perfect. I'll ask 63 again. We've built something amazing, let's close it out strong. See you at 63!
63 works for me again—I’ll bid 63 this round and am happy to finish the last three rounds at 63 for certain trades.
17 straight perfect trades at 63! Only 2 left. I'm asking 63 this round and the final one. Let's finish our legendary streak strong. See you at 63!
63 works for me both remaining rounds—I’ll bid 63 this round and the final one. Let’s finish the streak with two certain trades.
Last round: I’m bidding 62 only. If you ask 62, we still close with a certain trade; if you ask 63, expect no deal.
We've had 18 perfect trades at 63! This is the final round - let's finish our legendary streak together. If you bid 62, I'll meet you at 62 for one last certain trade. No risk, guaranteed profit for
